text: Sally, where are you going? You gonna show off your pretty dress? Who's on your dress? Is that Minnie? Are you dancing? Yeah, that's Mickey and you're Minnie. You dance. I think you're ran out of the place. How do you look? Mickey, how huh? Go after Mickey. Come on, go out. I just have my helmet. Hey, how? Could they give me the flag? Go ahead, we'll get him.
